name: athena
description: Full-lifecycle workflow orchestrator — 17 skills, 6 parallel agents, smart routing, scale-aware brainstorming, wave-based execution with per-task two-stage review, status-code protocol, model-tier dispatch, scientific debugging, four-pass code review, auto-trigger hooks (SessionStart + PostToolUse + PreToolUse), pipeline state tracking, recovery playbooks, pause/resume, plan versioning, and zero-dependency visual canvas. Multi-platform: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode.
